bibliography: A bilbiografia é constituída por referências documentais nas áreas da Engenharia Informática e Sistemas de Informação, sugeridas pelo(s) docente(s) da UC e pesquisados pelos estudantes.
objectives:
The CU of Tutoring Seminar aims to continue to the orientation given by the Seminar of Orientation of the previous semester, with the focus on the accompaniment of the literature review to be made to support the identified scientific research topic.

At the end of CU students should:


	
	Have identified the advisor and the theme of the dissertation.
	
	
	Know the areas of knowledge to be mentioned in the literature review, including a repository of bibliographic references to be cited in the final text of the dissertation.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
The structure of a dissertation.
	The research topic and its framework in the literature review.
	The Design of the Research for Writing the Dissertation:
	
		The approach to use.
		The methodology to choose.
		The definition of the scope.
		Data collection.
		Data analysis.
presentation: The CU of Tutoring Seminar aims to continue to the orientation given by the Seminar of Orientation of the previous semester, with the focus on the accompaniment of the literature review to be made to support the identified scientific research topic.
avaliacao:
Tema de dissertação: 70 % (avaliação conjunta com o orientador de dissertação).
Participação em debates, discussões, journal clubs: 30 %.
